description_long: This object is a stylized representation of an urban park or city block, featuring a large central green area surrounded by a dense arrangement of buildings. The central space is bordered by a continuous strip of greenery, possibly representing a park or recreational area, with a circular feature at its center. The surrounding buildings are depicted as rectangular blocks of varying heights and colors, suggesting a mix of residential and commercial structures. The layout is intersected by wide, gray roadways that form a grid pattern, providing access to the different sections of the area. The overall design is geometric and schematic, with clear demarcations between the built environment and open spaces. The asset uses muted tones for the buildings and roads, with green areas providing visual contrast.
description: A stylized city block with a central green park, surrounded by dense buildings and intersected by wide roads.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the city block from an elevated angle, highlighting the central green area and the dense arrangement of buildings on both sides.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the asset from a lower angle, emphasizing the length of the central park and the grid-like road layout.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a top-down perspective, clearly displaying the symmetrical arrangement of buildings and the continuous green border around the central space.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side view, focusing on the depth of the buildings and the expanse of the central green area.
attribute_tail_design: Not applicable; no tail structure present.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not applicable; no landing gear visible.
